title: Vintage Le Creuset “La Mama” Fondue Set – Designed by Enzo Mari – Enameled Cast Iron – Made in France
description:
Beautiful vintage fondue set from Le Creuset, part of the iconic “La Mama” collection designed by renowned Italian designer Enzo Mari. This elegant and collectible set is made of durable enameled cast iron and features a stunning, vibrant color that makes it a standout piece on any dining table.
Perfect for cozy fondue evenings with family or friends, this set combines timeless design with the exceptional heat retention that Le Creuset is known for.
Details:
Brand: Le Creuset
Collection: La Mama
Designer: Enzo Mari
Material: Enameled cast iron
Origin: Made in France
Condition: Very good vintage condition (please see photos as they form part of the description)
Set includes:
Fondue pot
Burner / stand (réchaud)
Fondue forks (piques)
A rare and charming vintage piece, ideal for collectors, design lovers, or anyone who appreciates classic French cookware. Perfect both for use and for display.
